title: LF12FIAE Skillset
subtitle: Carry out customer-specific application development
intro: LF12a combines project management with customer-facing software delivery from objective definition to reflection.
The focus is on capturing the customer order, economic efficiency, execution, testing, presentation, and evaluation of the project result.

subsections.title: Classify project management fundamentals and organization
items: Compare project management standards used in the company
Assign project roles and responsibilities clearly
Structure the project organization for a customer order
Classify process models in the company context
Secure collaboration between business department and development

subsections.title: Capture customer order and objective
items: Capture customer requirements in a structured way
Define goals and scope boundaries of the order
Turn expectations into measurable criteria
Formulate follow-up questions for unclear requirements
Align acceptance criteria with the customer

subsections.title: Evaluate project planning and economic efficiency
items: Plan work packages and milestones in a viable way
Estimate effort for core tasks realistically
Compare cost and benefit aspects for decisions
Integrate risks and buffers into the plan
Document planning assumptions transparently

subsections.title: Coordinate project execution
items: Work through implementation steps in priority order
Control changes during the project in a controlled way
Align status and risks within the team
Provide deliverables on schedule
Identify deviations early and take countermeasures

subsections.title: Test and document the software solution
items: Derive test cases from requirements
Record test results in a traceable way
Prioritize and track defects
Create user and operations documentation
Deliver acceptance-ready documentation

subsections.title: Present the software solution
items: Explain the solution path clearly for business and IT audiences
Make the core benefit and limits of the solution transparent
Answer customer questions with professional confidence
Run the demonstration in a structured, audience-oriented way
Justify decisions made during the project in a traceable way

subsections.title: Evaluate and reflect on the project result
items: Carry out an actual-versus-target comparison against the project goal
Analyze causes of deviations objectively
Document lessons learned for follow-up projects
Derive improvement measures for the next iterations
Prepare the project close with a sound overall assessment
